chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْمُؤْمِنِ وَ عَلَامَاتِهِ وَ صِفَاتِهِ
chapter_title.en: Chapter 99 –The Momin, and his signs, and his description

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/278)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: ضعيف - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (9/278)
text: قَالَ النَّبِيُّ ( صلى الله عليه وآله ) إِنَّ خِيَارَكُمْ أُولُو النُّهَى قِيلَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ وَ مَنْ أُولُو النُّهَى قَالَ هُمْ أُولُو الْأَخْلَاقِ الْحَسَنَةِ وَ الْأَحْلَامِ الرَّزِينَةِ وَ صَلَةُ الْأَرْحَامِ وَ الْبَرَرَةُ بِالْأُمَّهَاتِ وَ الْآبَاءِ وَ الْمُتَعَاهِدِينَ لِلْفُقَرَاءِ وَ الْجِيرَانِ وَ الْيَتَامَى وَ يُطْعِمُونَ الطَّعَامَ وَ يُفْشُونَ السَّلَامَ فِي الْعَالَمِ وَ يُصَلُّونَ وَ النَّاسُ نِيَامٌ غَافِلُونَ .

en.hubeali: (It has been narrated) from Abu Ja’farasws having said: ‘The Prophetsaww said: ‘The best of you are the possessors of the ‘Nuha’. It was said, ‘O Rasool-Allahsaww! Who are the possessors of the ‘Nuha’?’ Hesaww said: ‘The possessors of the excellent morals, and having strong power of reason, and the helpers of the relatives, and the righteous with the mothers and the fathers, and the ones who are committed to (help) the poor, and the neighbours, and the orphans, and are feeding the food, and they are disclosing the greetings (first) in the world, and they are praying Salāt while the people are sleeping being oblivious’.
en.sarwar: 32. Through the same chain of narrators it is narrated from abu Ja’far (a.s.) who has said the following: “The Holy Prophet has said, ‘The best among you are those who possess al-Nuha’.’ He was asked, ‘O Messenger of Allah, who are possessors of al-Nuha’?’ He then said, ‘They are those who possess excellent moral discipline and a heavy power of reason, maintain good relations with relatives, who are kind to mothers and fathers, committed to help the poor, neighbors, orphans, who serve food (to the needy), who spread peace in the world and who pray when people sleep negligently.’”
